title: AI Marketing Knowledge Management Tools Review: Notion vs Evernote vs OneNote for Small Business - 2026
description: Review Notion, Evernote, OneNote, and other AI marketing knowledge management tools for information organization and sharing. Find the best marketing knowl
content:
Knowledge Management Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need knowledge management: information organization, documentation, team sharing. Knowledge management tools enable content organization, search, and collaboration.

Core Features Comparison

FeaturesNotionEvernoteOneNoteTettra
AI FeaturesLimitedLimitedLimitedLimited
Information OrganizationBestStrongMediumStrong
Small Business FriendlyStrongBestStrongMedium
Team SharingBestStrongStrongBest
Price$10/month$8/monthFree$5/month

Notion Overview

Notion is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Knowledge Management features.

  • Core Capabilities: Professional Knowledge Management, user-friendly interface, comprehensive features
  • Advantages: Small business friendly, professional features, easy to use
  • Disadvantages: Limited AI features, pricing considerations
  • Price: Starting from competitive rates

Summary Comparison

ToolFeaturesSmall Business FriendlyPriceBest For
NotionStrongStrong$10/monthBest Knowledge Management
EvernoteStrongBest$8/monthFor small businesses
OneNoteMediumStrongFreeKnowledge Management analysis
TettraStrongMedium$5/monthEnterprise option

Recommendations

For small businesses, choose Evernote for small business friendly features. For best Knowledge Management, choose Notion. For analysis, choose OneNote. For enterprise, choose Tettra. We recommend Evernote for small businesses combined with Notion for best Knowledge Management, for optimal results.
